title: a cat named "แมว"
content:
I don't plan to keep the BBL entry for too long since I know the reason behind the problem. But I can't talk about it. It has something to do with <abbr title="Non-Disclosure Agreement">NDA</abbr>. So here's something cute for you guys to look at. :)

[gallery]

Seriously, the cat must be in a good mood today. :P
